talks.title: Cursor + Marimo Demo: Agentic Data Science at PyData x Cursor Boston
talks.speaker: Eric Ma
talks.description: A live demo of agentic data science where Cursor Agent Mode interacts directly with a Marimo notebook kernel runtime for faster iterative analysis. Eric walked through a protein data example, notebook visualizations, and practical prompting patterns that teams can reuse for exploratory data work.

categories.name: Academic Writing & Research
